# checkaivisible.com
> The only AI-visibility tool built for local restaurants. Check if ChatGPT and Gemini recommend your restaurant when customers search your category in your city.

## What this site is
- Free AI visibility checker for US local restaurants
- Public leaderboards of which restaurants appear in AI search results by city
- Methodology and data sources are transparent

## Main sections
- [Home](https://checkaivisible.com/): Run a free AI visibility check on any restaurant URL
- [Methodology](https://checkaivisible.com/methodology): How the AI visibility score is calculated
- [About](https://checkaivisible.com/about): Why we built this and the data behind it

## City leaderboards
- [New York restaurants](https://checkaivisible.com/new-york/restaurants)
- [Los Angeles restaurants](https://checkaivisible.com/los-angeles/restaurants)
- [Chicago restaurants](https://checkaivisible.com/chicago/restaurants)
- [Austin restaurants](https://checkaivisible.com/austin/restaurants)
- [Miami restaurants](https://checkaivisible.com/miami/restaurants)

## Key facts
- 45% of US consumers now use AI (ChatGPT, Gemini) for local business recommendations (BrightLocal LCRS 2026, up from 6% in 2025)
- AI is the #3 most-used recommendation source behind Google and Facebook
- ChatGPT-driven local searches convert at 15.9% vs 1.76% for Google organic (Seer Interactive)
- ChatGPT sources local recommendations from Bing index, Yelp, TripAdvisor, BBB, and Reddit — not directly from Google Business Profile
